c.d: The quantity of ready-to-use collage layouts or templates available within the app
Whether the app is available on iOS, Android, or both
How intuitive and easy the app interface is for creating collages
Availability of photo editing tools such as filters, text, stickers, background removal, and customization options
Presence of AI-driven features, e.g., template suggestions, background removal, or collage generation
Whether the app offers free usage and what premium features or subscriptions are available
App store ratings and number of downloads indicating popularity and user satisfaction
